/usr/bin/c++  --coverage -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/check.dir/test_account.cpp.o CMakeFiles/check.dir/test_transaction.cpp.o -o check  ../banking/libbanking.a ../third-party/gtest/googlemock/gtest/libgtest_main.a ../third-party/gtest/googlemock/libgmock_main.a ../third-party/gtest/googlemock/libgmock.a ../third-party/gtest/googlemock/gtest/libgtest.a
